title: poa nemoralis var. miliacea
intro: Poa nemoralis var. miliacea, also known as Wood Meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Wood Meadow-grass are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. In herbal preparations, Poa nemoralis var. miliacea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
